name: estimation-score-calculator
description: MVP score calculation app for the Egyptian Estimation card game.

scripts.clean: node -e "fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('dist-app', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:engine && npm run typecheck:app
scripts.test:engine: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.engine.json --outDir dist && node --test dist/tests/*.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:engine && npm run test:ui
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
